"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\green_eng.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\green_eng.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\green_eng.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\green_eng.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\User\Programming\C++\green_engine\bin\green_eng.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgreen_eng.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\green_eng.dir\linkLibs.rsp
